description_long: This object consists of a coordinated set of three seating units: a three-seater, a two-seater, and a single-seater, all designed in a matching style. Each piece features a sturdy wooden frame with straight, angular lines and exposed armrests, supporting thick, light gray upholstered cushions on both the seat and backrest. The armrests are flat and wide, constructed from the same wood as the frame, and the legs are blocky and robust, providing a stable base. The backrests are slightly reclined for comfort, and the cushions are plain, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for outdoor or public urban spaces such as parks or communal seating areas. The visible materials suggest durability and comfort, blending natural wood with soft fabric.
description: A set of three minimalist wooden-framed recliners with light gray cushions, featuring flat armrests and blocky legs. The design is simple, sturdy, and suitable for urban outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three seating units with visible cushions, armrests, and the full width of each piece.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seats, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, upright backrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden frame backs and the structure supporting the cushions, with no visible upholstery details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same depth and cushion thickness as view 1, with armrests and seat alignment visible.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are flat, wide, and made of exposed wood, matching the frame, with no visible padding or decorative features.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrests are single continuous pieces, each with a plain, uninterrupted cushion surface.
